headline: General Mills Reports its Impact in 2026 Global Responsibility Report
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 15, 2026--General Mills (NYSE: GIS) today released its 2026 Global Responsibility Report, detailing progress the company made across three priority areas — Food, Planet and People — during its 2025 fiscal year, May 27, 2024, through May 25, 2025. The report marks General Mills’ 56th year of reporting on its environmental and social impact, reinforces the company’s commitment to transparency, and features how General Mills is Standing for Good, a pillar of its Accelerate busine

content.title: General Mills Reports its Impact in 2026 Global Responsibility Report
content.summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 15, 2026--General Mills (NYSE: GIS) today released its 2026 Global Responsibility Report, detailing progress the company made across three priority areas — Food, Planet and People — during its 2025 fiscal year, May 27, 2024, through May 25, 2025. thumbnail.caption: The report marks General Mills’ 56th year of reporting on its environmental and social impact, reinforces the company’s commitment to transparency, and features how General Mills is Standing for Good, a pillar of its Accelerate business strategy.
